title: Rajnath Singh Calls For Round-The-Clock Monitoring as IGoM Reviews Developments on West Asia Crisis
description: The second meeting of the Informal Group of Ministers (IGoM), set up to monitor the evolving situation in West Asia and suggest proactive measures for its minimum impact on India, was held under the chairmanship of Defence Minister Rajnath Singh at Kartavya Bhawan-2, New Delhi, on Thursday.
